message:
perf: complete Arc<AssistantMessage> migration across providers, tests, and compaction

Finishes the Arc<AssistantMessage> migration started in the earlier
commit by updating all remaining call sites that construct or pattern-
match on Message::Assistant:

Production code:
- src/providers/mod.rs (ExtensionStreamSimpleProvider): unwrap Arc
  with .as_ref().clone() when converting AssistantMessageEvent back
  to StreamEvent (Start, Done, Error variants) and when extracting
  last_message from partial events

Test code migrated to Message::assistant() constructor:
- src/compaction.rs: 3 test functions
- src/providers/azure.rs, bedrock.rs, cohere.rs, gemini.rs, gitlab.rs
- tests/provider_streaming.rs: assistant_tool_call_message helper
- tests/model_serialization.rs: all AssistantMessageEvent tests
  updated to use Arc::new/Arc::clone

Also includes rustfmt cleanup in agent.rs, sdk.rs, rpc.rs, and
provider proptest functions (formatting only, no logic changes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
